subject: Milo, Turffield Gym Leader, standing in his pastoral home territory
description: A tall figure stands in a sunlit pastoral landscape, smiling broadly with one hand raised in a friendly greeting. He wears a wide-brimmed straw farmer's hat decorated with a sprig of green leaves, a green-and-white striped shirt, and forest-green dungarees with shoulder straps. Pale blond bowl-cut hair frames his face. Behind him a large dark-green topiary or hay-bale sculpture in the shape of a leaf or pokeball-like form rises against a soft sky, with a low fence line and rolling green fields stretching to a pale horizon. The lighting is warm and even, evoking late morning on a working farm.
foreground: Milo in farmer attire smiling and waving from a sunlit pasture
background: rolling green fields, low wooden fence, large green leaf-shaped topiary sculpture, pale blue sky
emotion: warm, welcoming, open-handed greeting; relaxed posture
